item.title: Clevta: Clevta @Clevta · 11s Jeremiyah Love is excellent but what was this schedule. 7 games vs bottom 36 rush defenses, 4 of th
item.description: Clevta @Clevta · 11s Jeremiyah Love is excellent but what was this schedule. 7 games vs bottom 36 rush defenses, 4 of the bottom 15. Did nothing vs Miami. Absolutely decimated bad defenses. In 24 was hurt vs the best run Ds faced, all in the playoffs, so hard to ding him. 6
